title: DevOps Beginner
description: Learn basic command-line commands, file permissions, scripts automation, containers, and infrastructure configurations.
career_objective: Become an entry-level DevOps engineer by mastering foundational terminal skills, scripting automation, and containers orchestration.
prerequisites: None - zero prior technical experience required.
learning_outcomes: Navigate and manage Linux systems with standard CLI tools.
Automate sysadmin tasks using bash scripts.
Understand container basics with Docker configurations.

title: Cloud Engineer
description: Master server foundations, network topologies, infrastructure configurations, and cloud deployment pipelines.
career_objective: Configure and maintain production systems across hybrid cloud and multi-tier architectures.
prerequisites: Linux CLI basics and basic networking concepts.
learning_outcomes: Provision secure cloud resources and networking gateways.
Write infrastructure code scripts for repeatable environments.
Configure systems monitoring alerts to observe health metrics.

title: AWS Cloud Engineer
description: Focus on Amazon Web Services deployment, VPC setups, IAM policies, and serverless compute frameworks.
career_objective: Design, deploy, and support scalable architectures on the Amazon Web Services platform.
prerequisites: Cloud computing foundations and basic command line navigation.
learning_outcomes: Deploy elastic virtual compute servers and relational databases.
Design highly available, secure VPC subnet configurations.
Implement serverless applications using Lambda triggers.

title: Azure Cloud Engineer
description: Master Microsoft Azure resource groups, Active Directory permissions, virtual machine scaling, and App Services.
career_objective: Build and manage secure Microsoft Azure infrastructures for enterprise integrations.
learning_outcomes: Govern resource access utilizing Azure Active Directory roles.
Deploy scalable virtual machine scale sets and load balancers.
Monitor application performance metrics using Azure Monitor.

title: Kubernetes Engineer
description: Deploy massive container workloads, networking overlays, helm charts, and gitops deployment synchronizations.
career_objective: Architect and manage production-grade microservice clusters at high scale.
prerequisites: Docker fundamentals and advanced Linux networking knowledge.
learning_outcomes: Deploy multi-node Kubernetes clusters from bare-metal or cloud.
Write Kubernetes config manifests, pods, ingress, and PVs.
Automate application rollouts using GitOps sync engines.

title: Platform Engineer
description: Build internal developer portals (IDP), secure infrastructure abstractions, and self-service capabilities.
career_objective: Design and deliver product interfaces that optimize developers delivery speed and security.
prerequisites: Cloud architecture configurations and microservices deployments.
learning_outcomes: Create clean developer tooling wrappers around clouds.
Build automated self-service databases provisioners.
Maintain organizational compliance policies automatically.

title: Site Reliability Engineer (SRE)
description: Focus on system availability metrics, error budgets, auto-remediations, and incident response runbooks.
career_objective: Maintain system reliability, speed up debugging routines, and minimize outages of massive scale services.
prerequisites: Linux kernel parameters, networking, and basic python/bash scripting.
learning_outcomes: Establish Service Level Objectives (SLOs) and Error Budgets.
Automate incident analysis utilizing real-time metrics tracers.
Tune Linux OS kernel TCP buffers for high-performance scale.

title: Infrastructure as Code Engineer
description: Write declarative configurations scripts using Terraform, OpenTofu, Ansible playbooks, and cloud templates.
career_objective: Eliminate manual configurations by declaring full datacenters inside source-controlled code.
prerequisites: Basic networking adapters and environment variables knowledge.
learning_outcomes: Write dry, modular Terraform configuration templates.
Manage infrastructure states locks across distributed teams.
Automate configurations compliance checks in code.

title: CI/CD Engineer
description: Implement build automation engines, compilation pipelines, testing environments, and artifacts packaging.
career_objective: Build automated pipelines that fast-track secure code deliveries from local workspace to production systems.
prerequisites: Basic shell scripting and git structures.
learning_outcomes: Write multi-tier pipeline definition scripts.
Orchestrate parallel automated testing environments runtimes.
Manage release package registries and build caches.

title: DevSecOps Engineer
description: Integrate code security scans, container vulnerability checks, secret management vaults, and network policies.
career_objective: Verify infrastructure safety and security posture at every step of development delivery pipelines.
prerequisites: Basic security parameters and networking setups.
learning_outcomes: Integrate SAST/DAST scanner checks in code commits hooks.
Inject secret keys dynamically using secure key vault tools.
Configure network policies enforcing least-privilege models.

title: Monitoring & Observability Specialist
description: Gather system telemetry: metrics charts, log collectors, telemetry tracing, dashboards, and automated alert limits.
career_objective: Establish full transparency of massive container networks health states using advanced tracing suites.
prerequisites: Linux CLI, networking protocols, and basic API concepts.
learning_outcomes: Instrument apps to export standardized metrics signals.
Write alert definitions targeting latency and error anomalies.
Trace API call timings across distributed microservices.

title: Containers & Kubernetes Specialist
description: Build lightweight secure container layers, configure overlay interfaces, storage claims, and autoscalers.
career_objective: Orchestrate massive Docker container operations using native Kubernetes scheduler parameters.
prerequisites: Docker Basics and intermediate Linux sysadmin skills.
learning_outcomes: Configure advanced container namespaces isolation configurations.
Deploy custom storage controllers on active clusters.
Implement Horizontal Pod Autoscalers (HPA) using metrics servers.
